scripts.git:release: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && git add package.json && git commit -m "chore(extension): bump version to ext-v$VERSION" && git tag ext-v$VERSION && git push origin main && git push origin ext-v$VERSION
scripts.release:patch: pnpm run bump:patch && pnpm run git:release
scripts.release:minor: pnpm run bump:minor && pnpm run git:release
scripts.release:major: pnpm run bump:major && pnpm run git:release
